modify.current_state: POST /api/v1/cart/items endpoint exists but default quantity behavior is not explicitly specified in API contract documentation
modify.required_change: API contract must explicitly state that default quantity is 1 when not provided in request payload
modify.reason: Story acceptance criteria requires default quantity behavior to be documented for API consumers

modify.current_state: Cart service component exists with price snapshot mechanism but automatic recalculation trigger logic is not explicitly documented
modify.required_change: Business logic must explicitly document that any quantity mutation (via PUT /api/v1/cart/items/{itemId}) triggers automatic recalculation of item subtotal and cart total
modify.reason: Critical business logic requirement for cart consistency and traceability to story acceptance criteria

modify.current_state: Empty cart handling is mentioned in version 1.2 but specific UI behavior (redirection link) is not documented
modify.required_change: Empty cart state must explicitly trigger UI presentation of 'continue shopping' redirection link as per presentation layer requirements
modify.reason: Story requires explicit UI redirection for empty cart state

modify.current_state: Component design focuses on backend services; presentation layer component specifications are not documented
modify.required_change: LLD should document presentation layer components: Cart View Interface, Empty Cart View, Add to Cart Handler, Quantity Updater Component with their responsibilities and interactions
modify.reason: Story specifies presentation layer needs for cart management UI
